ancient_book.title: Find an Ancient Book in a structure chest (ruins, strongholds, temples)

subtitle.text: Someone wrote this. You can read it.

description: What you get depends on what the system feels like giving you.
Someone wrote this enchantment down deliberately.
You extract knowledge from the page, not from chance.
Immersive Enchanting completely replaces the enchanting table GUI
with a skill-tree system. XP cost eliminated.
Ancient Books go into Chiseled Bookshelves around the table.
The table reads the books. You unlock the branch.
Vanilla bookshelves do nothing — only Chiseled Bookshelves work.
→ Find an Ancient Book in a structure chest [check]
